notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ezequiel Duran.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Josh Jung. Hunter Goodman scores. Ezequiel Tovar scores. Kyle Karros out at 2nd on the throw, left fielder Sam Haggerty to third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Justin Foscue.
